AddressInfo.Title: Solar Charging Station for E-Bikes & E-Scooters.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: @ the railroad station,off-grid with only 1 photovoltaic panel & small battery,able to charge only tiny vehicles as e-bikes,e-scooters,wheelchairs,RC models,or U can charge Your laptop or cellphone,when U r waiting here for a train...Publicly available on the street,no authentication needed.

Connections.Reference: probably property of village hall Květná.
Connections.Comments: For e-bikes/e-scooters/wheelchairs or other tiny vehicles only.

GeneralComments: Off-grid solar-only charging station for tiny vehicles.
